healthy_description: Soft pale green leaves with loose to tight heads. Tender crisp texture. Light green color.

symptom_guide.symptom: White powdery coating on lower leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine white fungal powder on leaf undersides, eventually spreads to upper surface

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellow spots with grayish mold on leaf undersides
symptom_guide.visual_description: Angular yellow lesions on top of leaves with gray-purple mold underneath

symptom_guide.symptom: Plant wilts and collapses in moist soil
symptom_guide.visual_description: Base of plant becomes water-soaked and rots despite adequate moisture

symptom_guide.symptom: Lower leaves are eaten away, seedlings missing
symptom_guide.visual_description: Irregular holes in lower leaves, seedlings cut off at soil level
